name: Gingerbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Place the gingerbread cookie mix in a large bowl.
3. Add the molasses, butter, and water to the bowl. Beat until smooth.
4. Refrigerate the dough for 2 hours.
5. Cut the dough into quarters. Work with one quarter at a time.
6. Roll the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch on a floured board.
7. Cut into assorted shapes and place on ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 8-9 minutes.
9. Cool for 2 minutes, then transfer to a rack to cool further.
10. Repeat with remaining dough.
